text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a Moderator. Thanks for stepping up to help keep things running smoothly — check out the mod handbook in #mod-resources and feel free to reach out if you have questions.
Welcome, guide_sam! You're in as an Event Helper. We're glad to have you on board — head over to #events to see what's coming up and how you can get involved.
Hey newbie_kim, welcome to the community! You've joined as a Member. Take a look around, introduce yourself in #introductions, and don't hesitate to ask if you need anything.
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a Mentor — we're really excited to have your experience in the community. Check out #mentor-lounge to connect with the rest of the mentorship team.
